sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Missing items have been returned to chests at Energy Manipulators - these items will appear in a new tab intended for 20v20 matches
Fixed ground collision on bridge to Martlock Expedition Master
20v20 Crystal League matches now reward the correct number of Tomes of Insight (was previously around 3x higher than intended)
Level 1 time slots for 20v20 Off-Season Crystal League corrected
